title: Default Dark Mode: Patcher
description: A Client-Side Minecraft Mod that Patches and Modifies the “Default Dark Mode” resource pack for Newer Minecraft Versions.
body:
# ARCHIVED (APRIL 4, 2026) This Modrinth project on Modrinth has been temporarily archived because the original resource pack, https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode, is now up-to-date as of this writing, making the Default Dark Mode: Patcher unnecessary. However, if the resource pack becomes inactive or doesn't receive updates, I will eventually return to this mod if needed! # About This Client-Side Minecraft Mod is designed to patch and modify the **[Default Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode)** resource pack, aiming to be up to par with Newer Minecraft versions & **[Default Dark Mode: Expansion](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode-expansion)** Add-On. ## Credits **[Aric3435](https://www.curseforge.com/members/aric3435)** - The creator of the **Default Dark Mode: Patcher** mod.
**[NebuIr](https://www.curseforge.com/members/nebuir)** - The creator of the **Default Dark Mode** resource pack.
**[Vi_Tul](https://www.curseforge.com/members/vi_tul)** - Updated the Shader Files (`rendertype_text.fsh` & `rendertype_text_intensity.fsh`) for **25w19a+ (1.21.6-1.21.8)** - Removed in "Default Dark Mode: Patcher v1.2.0+". ## Update: DDM 2026.2.0 NebuIr published an update to the resource pack for 1.21.6-1.21.11 https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode/version/2026.2.0-1.21.11 but that doesn't make the patcher useless yet, the patcher allows it to support Minecraft 26.1 Snapshots! But when I do start the update v1.3.3 of the mod, it will target the latest release of the resource pack & remove the duplicate textures it adds! ## How to use 1. Install **Default Dark Mode: Patcher** 2. Start the game—the patcher will automatically uncompress the zip file, apply the files I mentioned above, and recompress it. 3. Once patched, uninstall **Default Dark Mode: Patcher**—it’s mostly just a one-time-use tool designed to modify the Resource Pack. ---
